audit_items.proof_trace: The early-return guard at line 757 covers all three invalid-auction conditions (auctionStart==0, expired, timestamp<auctionStart) via short-circuit OR before any call to _getAssetPrice, so no revert can occur in those branches. The uint24 auctionDuration (max ~16.7M sec) combined with a block.timestamp-derived auctionStart precludes any arithmetic overflow in Solidity 0.8.26. The natspec-documented revert path (negative data-feed price) only fires when the auction is active, i.e., after the guard passes.
